articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 10 Nisan 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 10 Nisan 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: Doki Doki Literature Club Removed From Google Play Store After Already Being There For Months
articles.title_tr: Doki Doki Literature Club Removed From Google Play Store After Already Being There For Months
articles.summary: Doki Doki Literature Club has been pulled from the Google Play Store, just a few months after its release on the mobile storefront back in December 2025. In a statement from Serenity Forge, the studio cites that Google chose to remove the game from the Google Play Store as its content violates the storefront's terms of service in "its depiction of sensitive themes.""DDLC is available on many different major platforms, including iOS, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation, and more," Serenity Forge writes. "We're continuing to do everything we can to find a path forward for getting DDLC reinstated on the Google Play Store. Meanwhile, we're also looking into potential options for alternate methods of distribution on Android devices."At this point, it's no secret that Doki Doki Literature Club is a disturbing experience that touches on self-harm and emotional abuse, and uses graphic imagery to do so, but there's a big "This game is not suitable for children or those who are easily disturbed" warning on store pages for the game. Audiences are suitably warned that this is a horror game, despite marketing material and the game's first hour disguising the experience as a romantic-comedy visual novel.Continue Reading at GameSpot

"We're continuing to do everything we can to find a path forward for getting DDLC reinstated on the Google Play Store. Meanwhile, we're also looking into potential options for alternate methods of distribution on Android devices."At this point, it's no secret that Doki Doki Literature Club is a disturbing experience that touches on self-harm and emotional abuse, and uses graphic imagery to do so, but there's a big "This game is not suitable for children or those who are easily disturbed" warning on store pages for the game. articles.title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla Headlines April's Humble Choice Collection
articles.title_tr: Assassin's Creed Valhalla Headlines April's Humble Choice Collection
articles.summary: April 2026's Humble Choice lineup is live, and this month's batch of PC games is an eclectic mix of heart-warming indies, AAA blockbusters, and hidden gems. Assassin's Creed Valhalla is undoubtedly the biggest draw here, being one of the biggest games in Ubisoft's long-running series. If you're more of an indie game fan, Until Then, from developer Polychroma Games, is a delightful coming-of-age visual novel that offers a look into Filipino culture. articles.summary: Son dakika Çanakkale deprem haberleri.. Çanakkale'de deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem Çanakkale'de nerede oldu? Çanakkale Kandilli ve AFAD son depremler.. 10 Nisan 2026 Çanakkale deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu Çanakkale'de? Çanakkale son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Çanakkale'de ve Çanakkale yakınındaki depremler nelerdir? Çanakkale'de anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika Çanakkale canlı deprem haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD Çanakkale deprem haberleri.. Çanakkale'de hangi ilçelerde deprem oldu ve hangi ilçelerde en çok hissedildi? Bugün Çanakkale'de deprem mi oldu? Deprem Çanakkale'de ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son Çanakkale'de nerede deprem oldu? articles.summary: World of Warcraft: Midnight is a very purple expansion, so it's not too much of a shock that Blizzard finally brought back one of its favorite purple characters for a plot twist. But what is shocking is the news she brought with her: a hint that we may be going back to everyone's least favorite WoW expansion.

articles.title: You Can Still Find PS5s At Pre-Price Hike MSRP - The Best PS5 Deals Of The Week (March 31, 2026)
articles.title_tr: You Can Still Find PS5s At Pre-Price Hike MSRP - The Best PS5 Deals Of The Week (March 31, 2026)
articles.summary: This is a strange week for PS5 deals. The console price hike has officially taken effect, but you can still find it at its old prices in some places. A bunch of video game deals are also carrying over from late March (including a huge price cut for the Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater (Collector's Edition), and there are several new deals for games like Space Marine 2 and Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2, the latter of which now matches its lowest price ever.Accessory deals are a bit scarce, but you can get popular headsets from Razer and Turtle Beach for cheap, while Target is running a nice discount on refurbished DualSense Controllers. From games and controllers to consoles and headsets, here are the best PS5 deals this week.Best PS5 Hardware Deals (PS5 Slim, PS5 Pro, PS Portal)It looks like some retailers didn't get the memo--several spots are still carrying PS5 consoles with their old price tags. We're sure these won't stick around for long, but right now you can find all sorts of deals at Best Buy, GameStop, Walmart, and Target. You can even find the Fortnite Flowering Chaos Bundle in stock at a few retailers, which gets you a PS5 Slim Disc Edition and some nice Fortnite goodies for just $400. With the new price hike, that's a phenomenal deal. Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: How to Watch Artemis II Head Back to Earth From Its Moon Mission Tonight via a Telescope Livestream
articles.title_tr: How to Watch Artemis II Head Back to Earth From Its Moon Mission Tonight via a Telescope Livestream
articles.summary: NASA's Artemis II Orion spacecraft is getting ready to make its grand return to Earth following its mission around the Moon, and you can watch it soar through space as it nears home via a Virtual Telescope Project (VTP) livestream later tonight.
